levels.descEn: Damage +80% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers
levels.descTemplate: Damage +%d%% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers

levels.descEn: Damage +100% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers
levels.descTemplate: Damage +%d%% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers

longDesc: Arbre technologique des navires et des flottes. « Torpedo » monte jusqu'au niveau 2. Effet maximum : « Damage +100% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers  ». Accessible dès le début de la recherche. Pertinente sur toute campagne où plus de 30% des combats ont lieu en mer.
longDescEn: Part of the naval technology tree for ships and fleets. "Torpedo" scales up to level 2. Maximum effect: "Damage +100% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers ". Available from the start of research. Relevant on any campaign where more than 30% of combat happens at sea.
longDescDe: Teil des Marine-Forschungsbaums für Schiffe und Flotten. „Torpedo“ skaliert bis Stufe 2. Maximaler Effekt: „Damage +100% when attacking cruisers and aircraft carriers “. Ab Forschungsbeginn verfügbar. Lohnt sich, wenn mehr als 30% der Kämpfe auf See stattfinden.
